verse_text: When He had come to the other side, to the country of the Gergesenes, a there met Him two demon-possessed men, coming out of the tombs, exceedingly fierce, so that no one could pass that way.

links.context: The country of the Gadarenes was in Galilee, an area with many Gentiles living among the Jews (see also note at [[MAT.4:15]]). Gentile influence on the Jews caused many of them to take on Gentile practices, such as raising swine (v. 11), forbidden by the Law (Dt 14:8). For more on this miracle, see notes at [[MAT.8:28]]-34 and [[LUK.8:33]].

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
